config.html:
Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frmTienDoChuyenSonAdd
Nút WinForms gốc: Lưu
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: TR_DINHMUC_GOVAN_GETBYSP3, TR_DINHMUC_GOVAN_RELEASE, TR_ORDER_DETAIL_GETALL, TR_ORDER_DETAIL_GETLISTBYORDER, TR_ORDER_GETALL, TR_ORDER_GETBYSTATUS, TR_ORDER_GETLIST, TR_ORDER_Get3, TR_TIENDO_CHUYENSON_INSERT
Entity phụ (lookup/filter cân nhắc thêm): tr_banve, tr_color, tr_common, tr_hehang, tr_khachhang, tr_loaisp, tr_material, tr_order, tr_order_detail
